title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Central Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1968. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 15th August, 1968, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1482, dated 2nd July, 1968, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
